failed_attempts.sql:
WITH relevant_profiles AS (
    SELECT p.id AS profile_id
    FROM profile p
    WHERE p.biography_lexemes @@ to_tsquery('english', 'beach wedding')
)
SELECT rp.profile_id,
       r.description AS recommendation,
       ts_rank(rp.profile_biography_lexemes, query) as relevance
FROM profile rp
JOIN publication p ON rp.id = p.profile_id
JOIN relevant_profiles ON rp.id = relevant_profiles.profile_id
WHERE p.description IS NOT NULL AND p.description != ''
AND p.description_lexemes @@ to_tsquery('english', 'beach wedding')
ORDER BY relevance DESC
LIMIT 10

failed_attempts.sql:
WITH relevant_profiles AS (
    SELECT p.id AS profile_id
    FROM profile p
    WHERE p.biography_lexemes @@ to_tsquery('english', 'beach wedding')
)
SELECT rp.profile_id,
       r.annotation AS recommendation,
       ts_rank(rp.biography_lexemes, query) AS relevance,
       r.annotation_lexemes @@ to_tsquery('english', 'clothing items') as is_about_clothing
FROM profile rp
JOIN publication p ON rp.id = p.profile_id
JOIN relevant_profiles ON rp.id = relevant_profiles.profile_id
LEFT JOIN comment r ON p.id = r.publication_id
WHERE r.annotation IS NOT NULL AND r.annotation != ''
AND r.annotation_lexemes @@ to_tsquery('english', 'clothing items')
ORDER BY relevance DESC, is_about_clothing DESC
LIMIT 10
